title: Quiet Runner First Real Sprint Execution V0
objectives: Executar um canário real mínimo via quiet runner
validation: FACTORYOS_ENABLE_QUIET_CODEX=1 .venv/bin/python -m app.cli codex-quiet-run --prompt-file <TMP_DIR>/quiet-first-real-sprint.prompt --cwd <FACTORYOS_ROOT> --model gpt-5.4-mini --reasoning low --sandbox workspace-write --approval never --label s045-first-real-sprint --execute --allowed-path reports/quiet-runner-first-real-sprint/canary.txt --no-push --no-deploy --no-paid-api --no-secrets > <TMP_DIR>/s045-quiet-run.json
Validar overall_status em ok ou ok_with_captured_warnings
